    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    I

    ImageCache - Class in gui.card
    A high-quality image cache for the application.
    increaseActionPoint(int) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    InfernalDrake - Class in nongui.listofobjective
    Represents the "Infernal Drake" Objective Card.
    InfernalDrake() - Constructor for class nongui.listofobjective.InfernalDrake
    Constructs a new Infernal Drake objective with its requirements and penalties.
    initializeDeck() - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameSetup
    Fills the main Game Deck with all card types: Heroes, Items, Magic, Modifiers, and Challenges.
    initializeObjective() - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameSetup
    Populates the Objective Deck with legendary monsters and bosses, shuffles them, and draws the initial three objectives for the board.
    initializePlayer() - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameSetup
    Initializes all players for the game session.
    isCanPlayItemInstantly() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    isCanPlayMagicInstantly() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    isDeckEmpty() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Deck
    Checks if the main draw deck is empty.
    isDeckEmpty() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.ObjectiveDeck
    Checks if the objective deck is empty.
    isGameActive() - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
    Checks if the game is currently ongoing.
    isHasRedBuff() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    isItemUnchallengeable() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    isUnchallengeable() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    isWinning() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
    Checks if the player has won the game via any condition.
    isWinningByClasses() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
    Checks if the player has met the winning condition for the "Party Path" (All Classes).
    isWinningByObjectives() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
    Checks if the player has won by collecting 3 Objectives.
    ITEM_H - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    ITEM_W - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    ItemCard - Class in nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard
    An abstract base class representing an Item Card in the game.
    ItemCard(String, String, String) - Constructor for class nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ItemCard
    Constructs a new ItemCard with the specified details.
    itemPath(String) - Static method in class gui.card.ImageCache
